title: Audit and update remaining security considerations, OSCORE/EDHOC, RPL security sections in 06-security.md for Yggdrasil consistency
description: Review sections 8.1-8.4, 8.8-8.10, 15.x for any outdated references to ULA, multiple addresses, or pre-Yggdrasil trust model. Update privacy section 15.5, key storage, replay. Ensure all point to unified single-key derivation. Add references to Schnorr48 and yggdrasil vectors where appropriate.
